stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
In region E, the air tends to become or remain non-turbulent because it is absolute (1) _____ and the (2) _____.

DALR: Dry Adiabatic Lapse Rate.
ELR: Environmental Lapse Rate.
SALR: Saturated Adiabatic Lapse Rate.

options.a: (1) unstable; (2) ELR is greater than SALR.
options.b: (1) unstable; (2) ELR is lower than SALR.
options.c: (1) stable; (2) ELR is greater than DALR.
options.d: (1) stable; (2) ELR is lower than SALR.
